body_text:
Hi RivFlo219,

  

Thanksgiving is almost here — and we still have **limited Thanksgiving Eve
catering spots** open for trays, platters, and full meal bundles.  
  
✅ Feeds a family of 5  
✅ Pick up available or delivery  
✅ Perfect for small or big gatherings  
✅ Order cut-off approaching  
  
we are running a Thanksgiving Special

  

Thanksgiving Packages!

Limited Availability, pre-order yours now  
  

![image.png](cid:dbb7-66f0-56a3)  
  
**CHOOSE ONE**

**🍗Turkey 10–12 lbs**

**🍗Pork Shoulder(Pernil) 10lbs  **

**🍗Flank Steak (5-7LBS) (extra $25)**

  

**SIDES (choose 4)**

🥧Mashed potatoes (2 lbs.) 6 oz per person

🥧Sweet mashed potato 2lbs  6 oz per person

🥧Butternut squash (maple butter bourbon flavored) (2 lbs.) 6 oz per person

🥧Green beans (1 lb.) 3 oz per person

🥧Regular stuffing or  Apple cranberry stuffing(add $10)

🥧Glazed carrots (2 lbs.) 6 oz per person

  

Looking for something different? Call us — we also have rice, plantains, yuca,
mac & cheese, and more.  
  

**AVAILABLE DESSERTS**

🥧Flan **(whole pie)- $25(serves 8 ppl)**

🥧Passion fruit mousse**(1 pint/16oz) $15(serves 4 ppl)**

  

**SPECIAL BOTTLE COCKTAILS, DRINKS AND COQUITO**

🍷Coquito (16 oz bottle) (Latin eggnog)**-$25**

🍷Rum Punch (16 oz bottle) - $15

  

**ORDERS MUST BE PLACED BY 24TH NOV**

Pick up available or delivery

📞 978 381 1212

  
Want us to hold a spot for you?  
Just reply **YES** and we’ll send your quote.  
  
or you can CLICK****[**HERE**](https://app.upserve.com/s/comeketo-restaurant-
and-sandwich-shop-leominster) to order

  

  

  

  

  

  

Best,

  

**🔥 Comeketo Catering Events Team **  
**Comeketo Catering**  
📘[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/comeketocatering) | 📸 [Instagram](https://instagram.com/comeketocatering) | 🌐 [Website](https://comeketocatering.com/)

📲 My Direct: (978) 678 3739

📲 Catering Main: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)  
  
  

To stop receiving these emails, click
[here](https://app.close.com/go/unsubscribe/orga_pOyYOigKEELdmODukgjigCD5pTRewtmBW1yq6YXkskq/219rivera@gmail.com/nYy67oTehbfFljcnDJ8K7LYs4ou0mRB3hPo8Obl7OSM=/)
